data.name: Miner Girls
data.detailed_description:
Miner Girls is an idle game where your goal is to get a lot of ores and sell them or use them to fuck every hired girl in your mine. Progress by gathering mining by yourself first, upgrading your gear and hiring new girls. Watch as your investments starts to pay off, even when you’re not playing, the girls will still mine ores.

Features:

  • Idle Gameplay: Hire the girls and enjoy see them work.

  • Simple Mechanics: Mine, Hire, Sell. Easy and efficient.

  • Incremental Progress: Unlock new upgrades as you mine new ores.

Perfect for players who love watching their investments grow like a snowball into massive progress over time. Whether you’re actively playing or letting it run in the background, Miner Girls delivers hours of relaxing incremental fun!

-Not suitable for watching at work

-Not suitable for all ages

-All characters in the game are over 18 years old

data.short_description: Build your mining crew, dig deeper, and grow your fortune in Miner Girls, a relaxing idle game where progress never stops. Upgrade your miners, discover rare resources, and watch your operation expand—even while you're away!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX compatible sound card

  • OS *: Windows 7 or later

  • Graphics: DirectX 11 compatible GPU
